items.scenario: You recently signed up for a weekend photography workshop at a local studio. The confirmation email did not mention what equipment to bring or where to meet. You want the details before the first session on Saturday.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Harlow. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain which workshop session you registered for
Request the equipment and meeting details you still need
Suggest a way to receive updates before future sessions
items.subject: Details needed before Saturday's photography workshop

items.scenario: You subscribed to a monthly meal-kit delivery service three months ago. This month's box arrived two days late and was missing several of the recipes you ordered. You have already been charged the full amount.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Delgado. In your email, do the following:
goals: Tell the company what went wrong with this month's box
Request compensation for the missing recipes
Offer a suggestion to prevent similar mistakes
items.subject: Late box and missing recipes this month

items.scenario: You are a tenant in a downtown apartment building. The elevator has been out of service for a week, and you live on the seventh floor. Carrying groceries and heavy items up the stairs has become difficult.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Abernathy. In your email, do the following:
goals: Provide details about how long the elevator has been down
Request a firm date for the repair
Suggest temporary help for residents on higher floors
items.subject: Broken elevator on the seventh floor

items.scenario: Your cousin is visiting your city next month for the first time. You want to plan a weekend showing them around, but you are not sure which places they would enjoy most. You have a free Saturday and Sunday.
items.direction: Write an email to Nadia. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain your plan for the weekend together
Offer a few options for places to visit
Suggest a time to confirm the schedule
items.subject: Planning your visit next month
